text: They updated my will and explained every clause in plain English.
The attorney gave practical advice about taxes and kept the meeting on time.
Good experience overall, but the initial intake form was a bit long.
They met with my whole family and answered everyone’s questions patiently.
Draft documents were accurate. One typo in an address but quickly fixed.
They coordinated with my accountant so I didn’t have to repeat everything.
Clear fee structure and no surprise charges at the end.
Office decor is dated but the legal work is excellent.
They offered evening appointments which helped with my work schedule.
Explained pros and cons of different trust options without jargon.
I got thorough answers, but sometimes responses took a business day.
They helped my elderly mother feel comfortable and respected.
Turnaround time on documents was faster than promised.
Quality was good but I wish there had been a clearer checklist of decisions I needed to make.
They recommended practical steps I could take immediately, not just documents.
Reception and paralegal staff were friendly and organized.
They spotted a mistake in a prior will drafted elsewhere and fixed it.
I had to wait 20 minutes past my appointment time, but the meeting itself was very helpful.
They gave me a binder and digital copies of everything, clearly labeled.
I left feeling like I finally understood my own estate plan.
Follow-up questions were answered, but I had to send a reminder once.
They coordinated signatures with my out-of-state son without any hassle.
Parking is limited, but they validated for the garage next door.
They anticipated questions I didn’t even know to ask about beneficiaries.
Emails summarized action items clearly at the end.
I got good advice, but the invoice layout was a little confusing.
They were open about when I did and didn’t need a more complex trust.
They explained how to keep documents updated as laws and my life change.
Everyone was professional and on time for our signing meeting.
Good experience. I wish there were an online portal for documents.
They made a complicated topic feel manageable, step by step.
They were willing to coordinate with my financial advisor, which I appreciated.
Phone calls were returned within one business day every time.
Some of the written explanations were dense, but they clarified them in person.
They offered to review my documents again after a major life change at no extra fee.
Friendly, efficient, and very detail-oriented. Highly recommend.
The only downside was limited appointment availability around the holidays.
They worked well with my bank to retitle accounts into the trust.
I never felt rushed, even though they were clearly busy.
Overall excellent. A brief summary sheet at the end of each meeting would be helpful.
